text.title: Scrum Ceremonies Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the scrum-ceremonies methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and a decision-gate that maps to a rule.

step.name: sprint_goal_falsifiable
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Sprint goal must be one sentence falsifiable at review (binary success/fail). Vague goals like 'make progress on X' must be rejected at planning.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `sprint-goal-falsifiable` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: retro_action_ownership
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Every retro action item must have a named owner + linked issue + due date — or it is excluded from the actions log.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `retro-action-ownership` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: backlog_ready_threshold
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Sprint Planning must NOT start without a refined-Ready backlog of ≥1.5× sprint capacity; force a refinement session first when below threshold.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `backlog-ready-threshold` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: standup_channel_not_dashboard
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Standup output must be delivered to the team channel — not to a management dashboard — to preserve self-organisation.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `standup-channel-not-dashboard` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: async_blocker_sla
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Async standup blockers older than 1 working day must escalate to sync or named owner — never rot in a thread.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `async-blocker-sla` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: validate_and_record
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-scrum-ceremonies.py --file artefact.json`. Record output under `## Status` in the artefact.
step.output: Exit 0 = artefact accepted; exit 1 = violations listed; exit 2 = usage error.
step.decision-gate: Validator MUST return 0 before downstream consumption.
